name: [Extra Sensory II] Andrew Prahlow - End Times
description:
// MAP 2 OF EXTRA SENSORY II
[https://beatsaver.com/playlists/797071]

=================================================

First off, I just want to say thank you. Thank you to the entire TotalBS team (Especially Swifter and Aeroluna) for giving me a chance with this project. When I started on this map, I honestly never thought it would turn into anything like this. At first, it was just going to be something simple with the sun, stars, and you. But as I kept learning more about Unity and Vivify, the project just kept growing little by little, until it became what it is now.

I’ve gotta give a special shoutout to Swifter for helping so much with the shaders, and to Aeroluna for making the custom UI possible. Without those two, this map would not have been able to become what it is now.

Over the past year or so working on this, I feel like my goals and what I want in life have completely shifted. I’ve got more drive and motivation now than I’ve ever had before, and I’m so thankful for that.

I'd like to also thank my closest friend, Azushii, for introducing me to Outer Wilds and encouraging me to start this map in the first place. Rest in peace buddy.. <3

=================================================
Custom Saber Model: [Coming Soon]
Custom Note Model: [Coming Soon]
Project Source: [Coming Soon]
Gameplay Video: https://youtu.be/YtETILVC4V4
Extra Sensory II Website: https://exsii.totalbs.dev/

name: {Vivify} Jaron - 743⁺Aether*✧ ˳ ⁎ ¹¹¹} ⁺ . ˳
description:
**Originally, this map was going to be my Extra Sensory II map.**

However, given the insane density of this song, it demanded rapidly changing visuals that kept up with how dynamic it felt to listen to. I did not have the technical or artistic skill to pull off this song. I tried and failed, for 3 years.  Finally, after executing Extra Sensory II this year, I realized it was time to tackle this behemoth of a project. This project took over ~350 hours, and 1000 repository commits. The majority of it was put together over the last 3 months.

I really think that I executed on this vision to a tee, landing every single visual cue that I imagined ever since I heard the song for the first time in 2022. I hope you can feel the electricity of this experience <3

✧

**Special Thanks:**
- **Frautcres** - Doing extensive technical performance investigations in order to make the map run without a hitch, as well as assisting with technical difficulties
- **Chaimzy, Astra, HAMCORE, Mawntee, TheBlackParrot, TinyPawb, Klondike, RidgeVR, UGEcko** - Doing loads of playtesting and giving feedback to make the map feel as polished as it does
- **SKYZA.** - Beautiful ribbon & saber textures
- **Jaron** - Creating this incredible song, and supporting me over the years as I tried to make visuals that shaped up

video: https://youtu.be/qZ1prxep0Wc
project source: https://github.com/Swifter1243/aether_map

name: Ghost Choir - Louie Zong (modchart)
description:
This is a relaxing modchart and a technical proof of concept. If you haven't played my modchart Dondante yet, please check it out: https://beatsaver.com/beatmap/123b5

The map requires the mods Noodle Extensions and Chroma. If Noodle Extensions is not available yet on ModAssistant, you can get the latest release at https://github.com/Aeroluna/NoodleExtensions/releases/tag/v1.3.5

Tips for a better experience:
- Disable static lights; there are no lights anyway
- Hide the HUD
- Turn the SFX volume down (0 or low value like 0.2)
- Enable bloom post-processing

Preview: https://youtu.be/XC7RY9C_EHs

I adapted this from Louie Zong's original animation: https://youtu.be/kXF3VYYa5TI

name: Spider Dance - Toby Fox (Undertale modchart)
description:
There are countless Undertale maps on Beat Saber, but what if you could actually experience a real boss fight? It's now possible thanks to Noodle Extensions, and I'm proud to present to you the first Undertale modchart: Spider Dance, where you will confront Muffet.

Tips for a better experience:
- Don't use static lights; there shouldn't be any lights
- Hide the HUD in player settings
- Enable "bloom post-processing"
- Enable "screen distortion effects"

Installation instructions:
- You will need Noodle Extensions and Chroma and their dependencies. All are now available on ModAssistant.
- If you read this in a future where the update broke the mods and they haven't been approved on ModAssistant yet, install the basic mods from ModAssistant and get the latest releases of Noodle Extensions, Heck, and Chroma from Aeroluna's GitHub: https://github.com/Aeroluna

Video: https://youtu.be/fy8KmUor6fI

I started this a while ago before Ghost Choir and then abandoned the project. But I finally decided to finish the work, so I hope you'll enjoy it :)
Thanks to Reaxt and Cyansnow, who testplayed and made detailed suggestions that helped me improve the quality of this map. I really appreciate it.

My social media links (please follow/subscribe): https://linktr.ee/nyri0

name: acloudyskye & N33T - Nothing Else (Modchart)
description:
9 months ago I created my first chroma map. At this time I didn't think I could make a map that you are about to play
In these 9 months, I learned a lot about walls, notes, environment enhancement, etc... but mostly how to properly polish a map.
I wanted to make something big, something even bigger than SOT(as in scale swifter silly u) and here I am today publishing this map.
This map contains 7 different unique environments that connect together with seamless transitions.
This map is a big step in the journey of modhcarts just like SOT.
I hope more people will see this modhcart as a place they can start and learn Noodle Extensions, You can also check the script of the modhcart on my Github. https://github.com/TzurS11/NoodleScript/tree/main/Examples/Scripts

Lastly, I wanna thank all the people that helped. even if you are not on this list I appreciate What you've done a lot!
@GojiCrafter, @tall_chilis_boi, @Swifter, @Mawntee, Stick, kiwii.

Showcase: https://youtu.be/qkSe0gOctEU

btw HAHA get fucked swifter! I got more environments than in SOT

You can hide away the fears you face

Read Warnings!

name: Powerwolf - Venom of Venus
description:
Back to my more regular style, Powerwolf is a power-metal band that perform around the themes of werewolves and religion, a strange but interesting mixture.

Ex+ has a no-colours mode for those who wish to play without the custom block colours, but unfortunately I can't fit such an option for all difficulties.

Normal 1.85 NPS
Hard 3.15 NPS
Expert 4.43 NPS
Expert+ 5.11 NPS

There is no easy difficulty, as that I needed the slot for the no-colour mode.

name: [Modchart] Sarah Cothran -  As The World Caves In
description:
This started out as just a simple environment animation test, and then quickly snowballed out into one of my favourite maps I've made so far!

Also big ups to Fatalution for doing the lighting on this!
This is our first collab together, and the first time I've collaborated on a map with someone who shared the same ideas/thought process as myself. 
This definitely won't be our last collab :)

Check out their profile and lightshow preview here:
https://beatsaver.com/profile/84945
https://youtu.be/1Fh5jL_UJBc


WARNING:
This map may cause mild motion sickness! 
If you feel sick at any point, remember that you can pause and it will stop everything!

(If you have frequent issues with motion sickness in VR, I recommend having a fan on, or keeping smaller carpet with a different texture in your playspace)

name: Belle - Lend Me Your Voice [Noodle Extension, Chrom+]  (Remastered!!!)
description:
If you are seasick in VR, do not play the "ALL EFFECTS" and "NO rotation (360 °)". For you, difficulty - "NO effects"

If there are performance problems disable "Mirror" in the graphics settings

name: Royal & the Serpent - Overwhelmed
description:
Feeling that finals crunch? Worried about the pandemic? General anxiety with the news, and just feeling overwhelmed? Don't forget to take a step back and take a breath. Maybe by dancing along to this song that perfectly captures all of those feelings! Complete with overwhelming Chroma 2.0 lights! And now the extra details:

BPM: 87
NPS: Ez - 1.71; N - 2.09; H - 2.75; Ex - 3.19; Ex+ - 4.11
Notes: Ez - 277; N - 338; H - 444; Ex - 516; Ex+ - 664
Bombs: Ez - 0; N - 0; H - 4; Ex - 4; Ex+ - 4
Walls: Ez - 136; N - 134; H - 144; Ex - 109; Ex+ - 109

Special thanks to qwasyx, Smay, and Cyrix for playtesting!

name: (Old Version) Paradise - Coldplay
description:
"Paradise" is a song by the British rock band Coldplay. The song was released on 12 September 2011. I kinda like this song for relaxing on long car rides and I don't know how it will feel as a beat saber map but I'ma try mapping it anyways. So here it is :)

2022 EDIT: Download the new map here: https://beatsaver.com/maps/28102

name: That's Life - Frank Sinatra
description:
Here is an honest-to-goodness human-mapped version of Frank Sinatra's 1966 hit, That's Life. This song is way too good to just have a crappy beat sage map.

Normal and Hard Standard levels, and Expert Standard, 90, and 360 levels. Note that the expert levels are all essentially the same, just with varying degrees of wobbles.

Thanks to Maybeemae for the playtests!

https://youtu.be/QXjj2-fgK8U

description:
MAP IS NOT WORKING ON QUEST 1.37+
MAP IS NOT WORKING ON QUEST 1.37+
MAP IS NOT WORKING ON QUEST 1.37+

- Fix player position bug on quest
- Fix notes position bug on quest
- Fix gimmik part on quest
- Added suggested colors for notes
- Changed NJS and JD
- Fix sabers coming from the wrong direction in the intro

name: Wait - M83 (wall map)
description:
I wanted to do something special for this great song, and also see the potential of Noodle Extensions. A few tips for a better experience:
- disable the mirror effect in the game settings
- turn the SFX volume down in the player settings
- hide the HUD in the player settings

Video: https://youtu.be/oe6ThhijPy0

The map has a lot of walls, so you might not be able to run it on the lower-end hardware. I've included a version with less walls in case it helps.

name: Try - MitiS Feat. RORY
description:
Twenty-Sixth Upload

This map means the whole world to me, so I hope everyone enjoys this map. My father passed away on Jan. 23, 2021, in the middle of making this map. I am dedicating this map for him because of how much this songs means to me now. 
Pouring my heart and soul into this map took a lot out of me, making it as perfect to my little abilities I have for mapping.

Big shout outs to Lonely and Jamman for lighting this beautiful song and for agreeing to light it, it means the world to me.
Big shout outs to thelightdesigner for making such amazing and beautiful walls. Thank you for taking the time to make this, it means the world to me.
Big shout outs to Mawntee for giving me advice on how to make this map feel and shout outs to thelitlewiseowl for modding it, showing me what I can improve in this map. 
Biggest shout outs to everyone that play tested it multiple times. I am sorry for bugging them for multiple play test. 

And Biggest shoutout to my favorite chillstep/melodic dubstep artist, MitiS and Rory for making this beautiful song. 
You have no idea how much this song means to me, I thank you so much. Keep up the good work MitiS.

**NOODLES AND CHROMA REQUIRED**

I hope this map can show you the feeling in this song, as well as what it portrays. I tried my best, I hope it turns out great and everyone enjoys it. 
Thank you everyone for taking the time to download and play this map. I appreciate it everyone.

Feedback is always welcome!

description:
Thnks fr th Mmrs (or Thanks for the Memories) from Fall Out Boy.
So far the map that I have put the most work into (and which probably made me age by 3 years). Hope you enjoy it!

The map has Chroma lighting but can also be played without the Chroma mod.
Expert+ contains single saber sections and polyrhythm parts. Just so you are warned ;)

Big thanks to Sorukun for playtesting this map and especially to Timeweaver for pointing out all issues it had during its creation!

name: Still Alive - Portal
description:
I've wanted to map this song for a while now. And since this one's probably the last Portal song I'll map, I gave it my best.   

P.S. - I'm so glad to be back mapping this month. I had to take a break due to overwhelming stress, but now I'm feeling ready again.
I hope you enjoy.

Portal on Steam:
https://store.steampowered.com/app/400/Portal/

name: Someone Else's Hat - David Maxim Micic (modchart)
description:
David Maxim Micic is a prog rock genius. I wish I had the courage to map the 8 minutes of Mbinguni Amina but a few minutes of Someone Else's Hat will have to do. I really encourage you to check his stuff, because it's so good: https://open.spotify.com/artist/0wQa1N4q3HmLwxqkpVcYhs?si=aB4m1yonTg2qk5ounpOEUw

This modchart was an opportunity for me to have fun with environment animations, and push animations to a new level. The first scene is based on the album cover that Yelka made for Who Bit the Moon, and the rest is random ideas that I thought would be cool with this music.

Huge thanks to the playtesters and in particular Mawntee and Aggrogahu, who took time to give detailed feedback. I appreciate.

Preview: https://youtu.be/RX-payaVsKU

The map should work on Quest too, though it won't look as good due to the difference in how walls look.

If you like what I create, tell me, I love to hear from you:
- YouTube: https://youtube.com/c/nyri0
- Twitter: https://twitter.com/nyri0z
- Ko-Fi: https://ko-fi.com/nyri0
